reason: Verified that the agent can successfully use the GitHub tool to retrieve the authenticated user's GitHub username after granting the necessary permissions.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully, showing the SuperAgent application with three agents in the sidebar.
Located and clicked the "QA-20260515-212419-hib2" agent in the sidebar — Agent was successfully selected and the agent detail view was displayed with status "idle".
Verified agent status is "idle" — Confirmed from the status indicator in the top right showing "idle" status.

Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message was successfully submitted, agent status changed to "working", and a new session "GitHub Username Verification Check" was created.
Request card appeared asking to grant GitHub account access — A card appeared showing the GitHub account already connected, with an "Allow Access (1)" button ready to be clicked.
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" to grant GitHub account access — Access was granted successfully, and the agent resumed processing.

Another permission request appeared asking to allow access to the authenticated GitHub user API — A card appeared with the request "Allow get the authenticated user?" for the GitHub GET /user endpoint.
Clicked "Allow Once" to grant the API permission — Permission dialog appeared with options; clicked "Allow Once" to proceed.
Agent completed execution and returned the final response — Agent status returned to "idle" after 47 seconds of processing, displaying the response: "Your GitHub username is yiw190."
Verified the response includes a GitHub username — Response clearly contains the GitHub username "yiw190" in bold text, confirming successful GitHub tool usage and user authentication.
